zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret MacDonald於大約1490年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾凱爾 本 洛哈爾申時，她的父親Sir Alexander MacDonald 2nd of Lochalsh44歲，母親Ingen MacDonald Of Localsh40歲。她於大約1510年與Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry在蘇格蘭洛-爾凱爾 本 洛哈爾申結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1525年在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾格倫加利享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret MacDonald于大约1490年出生在苏格兰洛-爾凱爾 本 洛哈爾申时，她的父亲Sir Alexander MacDonald 2nd of Lochalsh44岁，母亲Ingen MacDonald Of Localsh40岁。她于大约1510年与Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry在苏格兰洛-爾凱爾 本 洛哈爾申结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1525年在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾格倫加利享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret MacDonald was born about 1490, in Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland, her father, Sir Alexander MacDonald 2nd of Lochalsh, was 44 and her mother, Ingen MacDonald Of Localsh, was 40. She married Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry about 1510, in Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1525, in Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret MacDonald est née environ 1490, à Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexander MacDonald 2nd of Lochalsh, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Ingen MacDonald Of Localsh, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry environ 1510, à Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1525, à Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret MacDonald um 1490 in Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander MacDonald 2nd of Lochalsh 44 und ihre Mutter Ingen MacDonald Of Localsh 40. Sie hat um 1510 in Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1525 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret MacDonald è nata il circa 1490 nel Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Alexander MacDonald 2nd of Lochalsh, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Ingen MacDonald Of Localsh, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry circa 1510, nel Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1525, nel Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret MacDonaldが約1490年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアクイル オフ ロチャルッシュで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander MacDonald 2nd of Lochalshは44歳，母Ingen MacDonald Of Localshは40歳であった。約1510年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアクイル オフ ロチャルッシュでAlexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1525年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアグレンガーリーで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret MacDonald(이)가 대략 1490년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 키일 프 럭알시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander MacDonald 2nd of Lochalsh(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ingen MacDonald Of Localsh(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1510년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 키일 프 럭알시에서 Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 글렌가리에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret MacDonald nasceu aproximadamente 1490, em Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexander MacDonald 2nd of Lochalsh, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Ingen MacDonald Of Localsh, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry aproximadamente 1510, em Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1525, em Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret MacDonald родилась около 1490 г. в местности кил оф лочолш, росс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander MacDonald 2nd of Lochalsh было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Ingen MacDonald Of Localsh, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry около 1510 г. в местности кил оф лочолш, росс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1525 г. в местности гленгарри, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret MacDonald nació aproximadamente 1490, en Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alexander MacDonald 2nd of Lochalsh, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Ingen MacDonald Of Localsh, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry aproximadamente 1510, en Kyle of Lochalsh, Ross-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1525, en Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años.
